description: Heap-based buffer overflow in DUNZIP32.DLL for RealPlayer 8, 10, and 10.5 and RealOne Player 1 and 2 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted RealPlayer Skin (RJS) file, a different vulnerability than CVE-2004-1094.
